person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Fouque d'Aulnay, or Fulk de Aneio (de Alneto, de Aneto, d'Anet) was the son of Osmund de Centumville (Cotenvill) and the niece of the Duchess Gonnor (Gunnor).

Fouque d'Aulnay could possibly be brothers with William de Vernon.

Fulk d'Aulnay and Fulk d'Aunou are separate people.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Fouque de Aulnay de Vernon Centville於大約0990年出生在法國阿奎泰洛吉吉加洛貝瑟時，他的父親Osmond Bassett de Centreville32歲，母親Satselina de Coutances29歲。他和Kudo de Pothier至少有7個兒子。他去世於1067年5月1日在英國巴金哈姆爾阿丁頓,第一代西德默斯子爵享年78歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾阿丁頓,第一代西德默斯子爵。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Fouque de Aulnay de Vernon Centville于大约0990年出生在法国阿奎泰洛吉吉加洛貝瑟时，他的父亲Osmond Bassett de Centreville32岁，母亲Satselina de Coutances29岁。他和Kudo de Pothier至少有7个儿子。他去世于1067年5月1日在英国巴金哈姆爾阿丁頓,第一代西德默斯子爵享年78岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾阿丁頓,第一代西德默斯子爵。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Fouque
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Jean-Michel, Marcel, Raoul.
French: from a pet form of the personal name Fouque, itself from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic names formed with folk ‘people’. Compare Fuqua and Fuquay .

History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its altered forms Fuqua and Fuquay) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Fouquette
meanings: Altered form of French Fouquet , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

historicEvents.title: Danes Attack London
historicEvents.description: Danes and Norwegians attacked London unsuccessfully in 994.

historicEvents.title: St. Brice's Day Massacre
historicEvents.description: King Aethelred ordered all Danish men in England to be killed. It is unknown how many Danes were killed due to this order.

historicEvents.title: Sweyn Forkbeard
historicEvents.description: The Danes raided and captured England. Sweyn, King of Danes, was declared King of England on Christmas Day.

historicEvents.title: Canut the Great
historicEvents.description: As Aethelred, King of England died, his son, Edmund Ironside devised a truce with Danish King Canute. The truce divided the kingdom between the two but Edmund died shortly after and became King of England. Several years later, he also became king of Denmark.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Fouque de Aulnay de Vernon Centville was born about 0990, in Basset, Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, France, his father, Osmond Bassett de Centreville, was 32 and his mother, Satselina de Coutances, was 29. He had at least 7 sons with Kudo de Pothier. He died on 1 May 1067, in Addington, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 78, and was buried in Addington, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Fouque de Aulnay de Vernon Centville est né environ 0990, à Basset, Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, France, son père, Osmond Bassett de Centreville, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Satselina de Coutances, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 7 fils avec Kudo de Pothier. Il est décédé le 1 mai 1067, à Addington, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Addington, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Fouque de Aulnay de Vernon Centville um 0990 in Basset, Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Osmond Bassett de Centreville 32 und seine Mutter Satselina de Coutances 29. Er hatte mit Kudo de Pothier mindestens 7 Söhne. Er starb am 1. Mai 1067 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Addington, Buckinghamshire, England und wurde in Addington, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Fouque de Aulnay de Vernon Centville è nato il circa 0990 nel Basset, Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, Francia, il suo padre, Osmond Bassett de Centreville, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Satselina de Coutances, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 7 figli con Kudo de Pothier. Morì il 1 maggio 1067, nel Addington, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Addington, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Fouque de Aulnay de Vernon Centvilleが約0990年にフランスアクイティアインロト-エト-ガーオンバセトで生まれた時，父Osmond Bassett de Centrevilleは32歳，母Satselina de Coutancesは29歳であった。彼はKudo de Pothierとの間に少なくとも7人の息子をもうけた。彼は1067年5月1日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアアッドイントンで78歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアアッドイントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Fouque de Aulnay de Vernon Centville(이)가 대략 0990년 프랑스 아키테인 로트-트-가니 배세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Osmond Bassett de Centreville(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Satselina de Coutances(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Kudo de Pothier(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1067년 5월 1일 영국 벅잉함실르 애딩턴에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 애딩턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Fouque de Aulnay de Vernon Centville nasceu aproximadamente 0990, em Basset, Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Osmond Bassett de Centreville, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Satselina de Coutances, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 7 filhos com Kudo de Pothier. Ele faleceu em 1 de maio de 1067, em Addington, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Addington, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Fouque de Aulnay de Vernon Centville родился около 0990 г. в местности бассет, лот-ет-гаронн, аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени Osmond Bassett de Centreville было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Satselina de Coutances, 29. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей от Kudo de Pothier. Он умер 1 мая 1067 г. в местности аддингтон, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности аддингтон, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Fouque de Aulnay de Vernon Centville nació aproximadamente 0990, en Basset, Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Osmond Bassett de Centreville, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Satselina de Coutances, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos con Kudo de Pothier. Murió el 1 de mayo de 1067, en Addington, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Addington, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
